_comment: QA-enabled project settings template. Preferred install = `bash ~/.claude/scripts/qa-sdk.sh init` (copies hooks project-local + merges this). Manual fallback: copy the qa-*.js + _qa-common.js + governed-gate-workflow-guard.js hooks into <project>/.claude/hooks/ and merge `hooks` into <project>/.claude/settings.json. Hook paths use ${CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR} (portable; no per-machine HOME edit needed). Hooks gate by .qa/config.json presence — safe to keep enabled in non-QA branches.

PreToolUse._purpose: 承重柱 2 (P1): subagent-only test execution — block test-runner commands on the main thread (no agent_id), allow subagent runs (agent_id present). strict=block, warn=advisory.
P4 soft entry gate (2026-06-16): block qa-sdk evidence.run/evidence.append/gate.check until a QA level is selected (.qa/state/level-selected.json). NARROW — only those commands; fail-open.
P4 soft reminder (2026-06-16): advisory nudge to write a durable .qa/state/tasklist.json before QA evidence/gate commands. Never blocks.
D1 verdict write-guard: block direct non-SDK writes to .qa/evidence/<tag>/ verdict files (qa_evidence_bundle / gate-result / release-decision). Matcher MUST include MultiEdit (HOOK-BYPASS-MATRIX).
P3 (2026-06-16): block writing fallback_used:true into .qa/** without a valid .qa/fallback-approval.json (human attestation). Same hook also runs at Stop.

Governed Gate Mode (CLAUDE.md §3.7) + workflow-spec launch gate. governed-gate-workflow-guard blocks inline model-authored Dynamic Workflows / ultracode during an active gate (governed_gate_mode in .qa/config.json: off|active-gate|always, default active-gate); qa-preview-gate validates spec_hash + sentinel + commercial-cert budget for deterministic qa-orchestrator launches.

PostToolUse._purpose: D2 stale-marker: after a QA-relevant source/config/test edit, mark .qa/evidence/<tag>/ STALE if a bundle for the active tag exists (freshness window from .qa/config.json evidence_freshness_hours, default 24h).
D2 stale-marker on deploy commands (same hook, Bash matcher).

Stop._purpose: P3 (2026-06-16): fail-closed — required:true layers in 00-test-plan.json must have evidence; additive NO-OP without intake.
P3 (2026-06-16): fail-closed — mobile/API/desktop target not covered by matching E2E kind (web-only fallback); additive NO-OP without intake.
P3 (2026-06-16): fail-closed — fallback_used:true evidence without human attestation; additive NO-OP without fallback markers.
